archetype: Organic & Earthy + Swiss Precision (Premium Editorial SaaS)
design_philosophy: A command center for ecommerce operators. French luxury meets operational efficiency. The UI must feel like a premium editorial workspace—warm beige backgrounds, sharp charcoal typography, and distinctive terracotta accents. No purple, no generic AI gradients. Total operational clarity.

motion.micro_interaction: subtle scale 0.98 on active state for buttons

components_instructions.cards: White background (#FFFFFF), 1px border (#E7E5E4), very subtle shadow (shadow-sm). Do not overuse drop shadows.
components_instructions.buttons: Primary buttons in Terracotta (#B84B31), sharp radius or fully rounded based on preference (use 0.75rem). Hover state should darken slightly to #993D26. Include data-testid.
components_instructions.timeline_kanban: Use vertical lines for the roadmap. Steps should look like distinct editorial blocks, connected by a subtle gray 1px line. Status pills should be tiny and uppercase.
components_instructions.data_tables: Minimalist borders. Header text should be uppercase, tracking-wide, text-xs, text-stone-500. Row hover state: bg-stone-50/50.
components_instructions.inputs: Shadcn defaults but force the border to be stone-200, focus ring terracotta.
components_instructions.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for a premium, consistent duotone or regular weight that matches the editorial feel.

login_background.description: Abstract architectural warm beige shape, perfect for a subtle, premium login screen background.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette: beige background (#FDFBF7), charcoal text (#1C1917), and terracotta accent (#B84B31).
Do NOT use dark mode. This is an operational command center that requires maximum daylight clarity.
Use 'Fraunces' for headings. Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, or Poppins. Use 'Satoshi' for body text.
Implement the layout with a 260px fixed left sidebar. The main content area must have generous padding (p-8 or p-12).
Use Shadcn UI components but customize their CSS variables to match the warm, editorial theme provided in 'shadcn_css_variables'.
All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, menu items, table rows) MUST have a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case describing their role.
For the 50-step workflow roadmap, build a vertical timeline UI. Steps should clearly indicate their status using the provided status colors.
Do NOT use HTML <select> or <input type='date'>. Always use Shadcn DropdownMenu/Select and Calendar/Popover.
Never use placeholders for images. Use the URLs provided in the 'images' object.
